scripts.generate: node -e "const{mkdirSync}=require('fs'); ['../platform/libs/generated/c1-digicore-runtime','../platform/libs/generated/c2-revital-advisory','../platform/libs/generated/platform-vkas','../platform/libs/generated/platform-control-plane','../platform/libs/generated/platform-model-gateway'].forEach(d=>mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true}))" && npx openapi-typescript openapi/c1-digicore-runtime.yaml -o ../platform/libs/generated/c1-digicore-runtime/types.ts && npx openapi-typescript openapi/c2-revital-advisory.yaml -o ../platform/libs/generated/c2-revital-advisory/types.ts && npx openapi-typescript openapi/platform-vkas.yaml -o ../platform/libs/generated/platform-vkas/types.ts && npx openapi-typescript openapi/platform-control-plane.yaml -o ../platform/libs/generated/platform-control-plane/types.ts && npx openapi-typescript openapi/platform-model-gateway.yaml -o ../platform/libs/generated/platform-model-gateway/types.ts
